items.title: Page-level enrichment: schema type, rating, FAQ-candidate conversion
steps: 1. Run enrichPageSeoData against a single page, verify live
2. Run enrichPagesForProject across all 4 sites
3. Reconcile every schema @type against the pre-batch baseline
items.expected: 0 invalid schema types, real rating on every eligible page, FAQ schema on every page with real candidates, no collateral changes to unrelated legitimate types
items.evidence: Batch: One Endo 19/19, Artful 15/15, Garrison 9/10, getalloro 4/13 enriched, 0 failures. Full type-count reconciliation against pre-batch baseline confirmed every count matches exactly (11 Endodontist/Orthodontist conversions, 0 collateral). Live curl confirmed on /reviews (One Endo): title trimmed, @type MedicalBusiness, FAQPage present, aggregateRating 4.98/1521 matching real synced data.
items.notes: Caught and fixed a real bug mid-run: allowlist didn't recognize getalloro.com's SoftwareApplication type, briefly mis-flagged 4 pages. Reverted immediately, confirmed clean, added regression test.

items.title: Deterministic title-length trim
steps: 1. Unit test against real over-length titles from the DB
2. Apply live via T1/T3/T4/retroactive sweep
3. Re-audit final title lengths across all pages and posts
items.expected: Multi-segment titles trimmed to fit, keeping the front keyword+location; single-segment titles left alone and flagged, never mid-word truncated
items.evidence: 7 unit tests passing using real 66-70 char titles. Final audit: 0/57 pages over 60 chars. Posts: 0 remaining except 31 single-segment article headlines (verified each has no ' | ' delimiter at all — correctly unresolvable by design, not a bug).

items.title: Generate full SEO for the 108 zero-data posts
items.precondition: Post has no meta_title at all
steps: 1. Dry-run to confirm target count (108)
2. Test against a single post, verify live
3. Run full batch across One Endo (92) + Garrison (16)
4. Confirm 0 posts remain with null meta_title
items.expected: Real generated title/description/schema/canonical for every target post, immediately enriched for og_image/rating/FAQ, canonical never fabricated
items.evidence: Batch: One Endo 91/91 succeeded (1 already covered by manual test), Garrison 16/16 succeeded, 0 failures. Post-batch SQL: 0 posts remain with null meta_title on either site. Live curl on /articles/root-canal-sterling-what-expect-saves-tooth confirmed real title/description/canonical (/articles/{slug}, not fabricated)/og_image all correct.
items.notes: Two execution-time deviations, both resolved before the batch ran: (1) full generation also triggers GEO auto-apply (body-content rewrite) — owner confirmed metadata-only scope, switched to calling the section runner directly; (2) canonical URL was being fabricated by the LLM again — now always deterministically overridden.

items.title: Generate schema_json only for Garrison's other 33 posts
items.precondition: Post has title/description but no schema_json
steps: 1. Dry-run to confirm target count (33, 32 after 1 manual test)
2. Test against a single post, verify title/description/canonical unchanged
3. Run full batch
4. Confirm 49/49 Garrison posts have schema_json
items.expected: New valid schema_json added, title/description/canonical byte-unchanged, rating injected where a business-entity element exists
items.evidence: Single-post test: title/description/canonical all confirmed identical before/after, schema_json newly populated with BlogPosting + BreadcrumbList. Batch: 32/32 succeeded, 0 failures. Post-batch SQL: 49/49 Garrison posts now have schema_json (was 0/49).

items.title: Full re-audit against the original table
steps: 1. Re-run the exact audit queries from the original report across all 57 pages + 254 posts
2. Confirm every legitimately-closeable cell is green
3. Confirm deliberately-excluded cells are still correctly absent, not corrupted
items.evidence: Pages (4 sites): 0 invalid types, 0 titles >60 chars, rating on every eligible page, FAQ on every page with real candidates. Posts (3 sites): 0 missing SEO data, 0 invalid types, 49/49 Garrison have schema_json, title-length closed except 31 correctly-unresolvable single-segment headlines. getalloro.com rating correctly still absent (no fabrication); Artful/Garrison/getalloro FAQ correctly still absent where no real candidates exist.
items.notes: Discovered during this task that title-trim hadn't reached the 254 posts from the prior plan (only T3/T4-touched posts got it) — ran an additional idempotent, zero-LLM retroactive sweep to close this before calling the audit final.

items.title: Build, lint, type-check, and test gates
steps: 1. npx tsc --noEmit
2. npm run check:conventions --strict
3. npx vitest run (full suite)
4. npx eslint on new/modified files
5. npm run depcruise
items.expected: Zero new errors/violations introduced by this change
items.evidence: tsc: 0 errors. check:conventions --strict: 0 clear structural violations. vitest: 158/158 passed across 18 files (22 new this session). eslint: 0 errors, 0 warnings on all new/modified source files. depcruise: 0 errors, 32 pre-existing advisory warnings, none from this session's files.

items.title: (Rev 2) Artful pass: generate the 1 blank post + schema_json for 74 articles
items.precondition: Rev 2 scope addition — Artful was missed by the original T3/T4 sizing
steps: 1. Extend seo-generate-missing.ts targets to Artful (merge-preserving existing seo_data keys) and refactor seo-generate-schema-only.ts to a multi-project list
2. Dry-run both: One Endo 0/0, Garrison 0/0, Artful 1 + 74 — other sites confirmed idempotent no-ops
3. Run full generation for the Angelita staff post, verify live
4. Run the 74-article schema-only batch, verify sampled titles/descriptions byte-identical via pre-run md5 snapshots
5. Re-audit the Artful row
items.expected: 0 Artful posts with null meta_title, 84/84 with schema_json, titles/descriptions unchanged, no invalid types, rating/FAQ only on eligible elements
items.evidence: Angelita: 60-char title, canonical /staff/angelita (deterministic, not LLM), og_image preserved through the merge, Person + BreadcrumbList schema, live-verified via curl. Batch: 74/74 succeeded, 0 failed. All 3 md5-snapshotted posts byte-identical on title and description. Final audit: no_title 0, no_schema 0, invalid types 0, rating 9→12 (3 articles whose generated schema included an eligible business entity), FAQPage 4→34. Live spot-check of /articles/adult-braces-dental-health shows Article + BreadcrumbList schema with the original title. Gates re-run: tsc 0 errors, vitest 158/158, check:conventions --strict 0 violations.
items.notes: One Endo and Garrison re-ran as no-ops (0 targets each), confirming both scripts are now safe, idempotent multi-site sweeps.
